summary: Entitlement-Based Media Access Control - ALL TESTS PASSED. 16/16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI correctly shows lock icons for free users and download icons for admin users. Free users see 'Upgrade to Download' CTA on Story Preview page.
critical_code_review_comments: entitlement.py: resolve_entitlements() correctly computes can_download based on plan_type and subscription_status
entitlement.py: Admin/Superadmin role override grants full access (can_download=true)
entitlement.py: Top-up credits alone do NOT unlock downloads (subscription_active check required)
media_routes.py: /api/media/entitlement returns correct flags (can_download, upgrade_required, plan_type)
media_routes.py: /api/media/download-token/{asset_id} returns 403 with DOWNLOAD_NOT_ALLOWED for free users
media_routes.py: Download access is logged to media_access_log collection for audit
story_engine_routes.py: GET /api/story-engine/user-jobs scrubs output_url to null for free users (line ~723)
story_engine_routes.py: GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} also scrubs output_url based on entitlement
MediaEntitlementContext.js: Fetches entitlement on mount and provides canDownload, upgradeRequired to children
EntitledDownloadButton.js: Shows 'Upgrade to Download' with lock icon for free users, download button for paid users
EntitledDownloadIcon.js: Compact version shows lock icon for free users, download icon for paid users
MySpacePage.js: Uses EntitledDownloadIcon on creation cards - correctly shows lock for free users
StoryPreview.js: Uses EntitledDownloadButton in Downloads section - shows 'Upgrade to Download' for free users
StoryVideoPipeline.js: Uses EntitledDownloadButton for download action - gated by entitlement
context_for_next_testing_agent: Entitlement-based media access control fully verified in iteration 393. Key findings: 1) Backend /api/media/entitlement returns can_download=false for free users, can_download=true for admin; 2) Backend /api/media/download-token/{asset_id} returns 403 with DOWNLOAD_NOT_ALLOWED for free users; 3) Backend /api/story-engine/user-jobs scrubs output_url to null for free users; 4) Frontend My Space page shows lock icons on download buttons for free users (34 EntitledDownloadIcon buttons all showing lock); 5) Frontend My Space page shows download icons for admin users; 6) Frontend Story Preview page shows 'Upgrade to Download' button with lock icon for free users; 7) No raw R2 URLs (pub-*.r2.dev) exposed in API responses for free users.

free_user_entitlement_can_download_false.details: GET /api/media/entitlement returns can_download=false, upgrade_required=true for free user

admin_user_entitlement_can_download_true.details: GET /api/media/entitlement returns can_download=true for admin user

free_user_download_token_403.details: POST /api/media/download-token/{asset_id} returns 403 with DOWNLOAD_NOT_ALLOWED for free user

admin_user_download_token_success.details: POST /api/media/download-token/{asset_id} returns success with download_url for admin user

free_user_jobs_output_url_null.details: GET /api/story-engine/user-jobs returns output_url=null for all jobs for free user

admin_user_jobs_output_url_present.details: GET /api/story-engine/user-jobs returns output_url for completed jobs for admin user

my_space_lock_icons_free_user.details: My Space page shows lock icons on all 34 EntitledDownloadIcon buttons for free user

my_space_download_icons_admin_user.details: My Space page shows download icons (not lock) for admin user

story_preview_upgrade_button_free_user.details: Story Preview page shows 'Upgrade to Download' button with lock icon for free user

no_raw_r2_urls_free_user.details: No raw R2 URLs (pub-*.r2.dev) in output_url field for free user API responses
